name: mere-orthodoxy
description: Mere Orthodoxy — Christian renewal for the common good.

hero_subhead.default: Long-form essays, a quarterly print journal, and patient podcasts on theology, culture, and politics.

podcast_feed_url.description: URL of the deployed podcast-feed Worker. Leave empty to hide the podcast section.

digest_form_action.description: Form action URL for the Weekly Digest signup (Kit, Mailchimp, ConvertKit, etc.).

journal_status_issue.description: Issue label shown in the Journal Status tracker on the homepage (e.g. 'Spring 2026'). Bump this when a new issue enters the pipeline.

journal_status_stage.description: Current stage of the next journal issue. The matching dot glows; the other two fade. Advance manually — Drafting → In Production → Arriving — then reset to Drafting for the next issue.

content_api_key.description: Ghost Content API key for the homepage topic filter (optional).

stripe_member_annual_url.description: Stripe Payment Link URL for the $100/yr Member tier. Create in Stripe → Payment Links. When set, the /membership Become-a-Member buttons link here instead of Ghost Portal.

stripe_member_monthly_url.description: Stripe Payment Link URL for the $10/mo Member tier. Used by the billing-interval toggle on /membership.

stripe_lifetime_url.description: Stripe Payment Link URL for the $995 Lifetime tier. Create in Stripe → Payment Links.

gift_url.description: URL for the gift membership flow.

group_url.description: URL for the group/organization membership flow.

institution_url.description: URL for the seminary/institution membership flow.

membership_api_base.description: Base URL for the membership-site Express app (Stripe + HubSpot endpoints).
